title: Hide prompt to use mobile app whe accessing from mobile browser desktop site

posts.author: Bert.seurynck (Bert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Possibillity to avoid the prompt “please use the mobile app”.
The mobile version of the app has some limited functionalities, for example links does not work.

whe accessing on browser and asking for dekstop site this still pops up, after a few refresh it loads the page.
